summary: Iteration 23: Tested two new features - Reviewer Performance Dashboard and Closed-Loop Coaching. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for both features. Owner can access Reviewer Performance page with stat tiles, period selector, reviewer cards with rating distribution, speed trend, and calibration drift. Management correctly denied access to Reviewer Performance (owner-only). Both owner and management can use Auto-Coach on Repeat Offenders page.
test_credentials: Owner: sadam.owner@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!, Management: hjohnny.super@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified two new features: (1) Reviewer Performance Dashboard at /reviewer-performance - owner-only page showing per-reviewer stats including rating distribution bars (sum to 100%), speed trend charts, and calibration drift gauges. (2) Closed-Loop Coaching on Repeat Offenders page - Auto-Coach button generates training sessions for Warning/Critical crews. Both features fully functional. Note: The nav link data-testid for 'Reviewer Perf.' is 'nav-link-reviewer-perf-' (with trailing dash due to period in label).

reviewer_performance_dashboard.stat_tiles: PASS - 4 tiles: Reviewers, Total Reviews, Avg Speed, Active Reviewers
reviewer_performance_dashboard.reviewer_cards: PASS - 2 reviewers found with all required components
reviewer_performance_dashboard.rating_distribution: PASS - Bars show fail/concern/standard/exemplary, sum to 100%
reviewer_performance_dashboard.calibration_drift: PASS - Low/Moderate/High label with Lenient/Strict/Aligned direction

closed_loop_coaching.coaching_card_visible: PASS - Card appears between Courses of Action and Heatmap
closed_loop_coaching.management_access: PASS - Management can also use Auto-Coach
closed_loop_coaching.results_display: PASS - Shows generated/skipped counts and session cards
closed_loop_coaching.idempotent: PASS - Second run shows mostly skipped (sessions already exist)

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/analytics/reviewer-performance: PASS - Returns reviewer_count, reviewers array with speed_trend, calibration_drift, rating_distribution
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/coaching/recommendations: PASS - Returns recommendations for Warning/Critical crews
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/coaching/auto-generate: PASS - Creates sessions and returns generated/skipped counts
